rationale: All Fully-Automated gates (AC1-AC5, AC7) and the Hybrid gate (AC6, supertest CORS variant) are green; typecheck/lint/build clean across packages/api, packages/types, apps/admin. Both hard umbrella safety constraints have dedicated passing tests: no self-escalation (AC2), super_admin-only role management (AC3). role stays input:false (AC5). CORS is origin-allowlisted with credentials (never wildcard, AC6). MFA is seam-only as specified (no plugin/migration/route/env). 8 adversarial scenarios ruled out. Two non-blocking notes: (a) AC8 Agent-Probe browser walkthrough deferred (no automated E2E runner — project-wide tracked gap; server-side enforcement already automated-proven); (b) a malformed non-uuid :id yields 500 not 404 (intentional, to preserve the LOCKED guard order; only reachable by an authenticated super_admin, not an escalation vector). Final EVL confirmation is orchestrator-owned (independent vc-tester re-run).
